verification.target_vocab_notes: 走る appears in dictionary form in the phrase 走るんだ
verification.kana_notes: Missing space or clarity in かぜ (wind) vs. 風, but generally accurate
verification.grammar_notes: Contains のように (like, similar to) which is N4+ comparative pattern. Also んだ explanatory form is borderline N4
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: のように is N4 comparative, んだ is explanatory. Vocabulary: またいつか, 風 are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Metaphorical expression
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 grammar pattern のように. Also uses explanatory んだ which is N4. Too advanced

verification.target_vocab_notes: 走る appears in nominalized form 走るのが
verification.grammar_notes: Contains のが nominalization pattern which is borderline N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: のが nominalization is borderline N4. Vocabulary: 彼女, 嫌い are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Contains のが nominalization which is borderline N4. Otherwise appropriate vocabulary

verification.target_vocab_notes: 意味 appears as object with が particle
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ている (言っている) which is N4 continuous/state grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~ている is N4. Vocabulary: 少し, 彼, 言う, 分かる are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ~ている grammar. Too advanced for N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: 意味 appears with が particle in the sentence
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~てはいけない (must not) which is N4 grammar for prohibition. Also complex relative clause construction
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~てはいけない is N4 prohibition. Complex relative clause modifying 言葉. Vocabulary: 自分, 言葉, 使う are N5. Length: Long. Context: Universal but complex
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 prohibition pattern ~てはいけない. Sentence structure also very complex with embedded clauses

verification.target_vocab_notes: 意味 appears with の possessive and が particle
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, の possessive, が particle, negative form わからない
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Basic N5 particles and negative. Vocabulary: これら (these), 文章 are upper N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. All grammar patterns are N5. Natural sentence structure

verification.target_vocab_notes: もの appears in そのもの (the very thing, itself) which is an idiomatic expression. Target is 物 (thing) as a noun, but this is a fixed expression
verification.kana_notes: Missing の after かれ (should be かれの not かの)
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: の possessive, は particle, past tense だった
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: N5 but uses そのもの idiom which is advanced. Vocabulary: 話, 単純 are N5-level. Length: Medium. Context: Abstract expression
verification.overall_notes: そのもの is an idiomatic expression meaning 'itself/the very thing'. Borderline whether this counts as target vocabulary. Minor kana error

verification.target_vocab_notes: もの appears but as sentence-ending particle expressing desire/wish, not as the noun 物 (thing). This is a different usage
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~たい + もの construction which is N4 pattern expressing strong desire. もの here is a modal particle, not the noun 'thing'
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~たいものです is N4 expressing wish. Vocabulary: 妹さん, 会う are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: FALSE USAGE: もの here is a sentence-ending particle (N4), not the noun 物 (thing). Contains N4 grammar

verification.target_vocab_notes: もの appears as a noun meaning 'thing' with な-adjective modifier
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, な-adjective 便利な, である copula (formal version of だ). All N5 patterns
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: N5 copula and na-adjective. Vocabulary: 電話, 便利 are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example showing もの as a noun. Clear usage with na-adjective

verification.target_vocab_notes: Duplicate of example_index 0. Same sentence appears twice
verification.kana_notes: Same kana error as example 0 (かの instead of かれの)
verification.grammar_notes: Same as example 0
verification.difficulty_notes: Same as example 0
verification.overall_notes: DUPLICATE of example_index 0. Should be flagged for removal

verification.target_vocab_notes: Duplicate of example_index 1. Same sentence
verification.grammar_notes: Same as example 1 - contains N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Same as example 1
verification.overall_notes: DUPLICATE of example_index 1. Should be flagged for removal. Also contains N4 grammar

verification.target_vocab_notes: Duplicate of example_index 2. Same sentence
verification.grammar_notes: Same as example 2
verification.difficulty_notes: Same as example 2
verification.overall_notes: DUPLICATE of example_index 2. Should be flagged for removal. However, grammar is acceptable N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: 強い appears in past tense form 強かった
verification.grammar_notes: Contains うえに (on top of that, in addition) which is N4 conjunction for adding information
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: うえに is N4 conjunction. Vocabulary: 寒い, 風 are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal weather
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 grammar うえに. Too advanced for N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: 強い appears as predicate adjective
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, が particle, i-adjective. Simple structure
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Very simple i-adjective predicate. Vocabulary: 彼, 力 are N5. Length: Very short. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Perfect beginner N5 example. Simple and clear

verification.target_vocab_notes: 強い appears modifying 風
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ている (吹いている) which is N4 continuous aspect grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~ている is N4. Vocabulary: 今日, 風, 吹く are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal weather
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ~ている grammar. Too advanced for N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: 弱い appears as predicate i-adjective
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, が particle, i-adjective です
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Basic i-adjective predicate. Vocabulary: 彼, 目 are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal physical attribute
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Simple structure with clear adjective usage

verification.target_vocab_notes: 弱い appears in past tense 弱かった
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, が particle, past tense i-adjective
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Past tense i-adjective. Vocabulary: 彼女, 体 are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal health
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with past tense adjective. Clear and natural

verification.target_vocab_notes: 弱い appears modifying チーム
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, past tense 負けた
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Simple past tense with modifier. Vocabulary: 私たち, チーム, 負ける are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal sports
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Natural sentence with clear adjective usage

verification.target_vocab_notes: 入口 appears with で particle
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: で particle (location), ましょう form (let's). All N5 patterns
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ましょう suggestion form. Vocabulary: 会う is N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal meeting
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Simple suggestion sentence with clear location

verification.target_vocab_notes: 入口 appears with に particle
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ている (立っている) which is N4 continuous/state grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~ている is N4. Vocabulary: 男, 人 are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ~ている grammar. Too advanced for N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: 入口 appears as subject with が particle
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: が particle, に particle (location), ます-form
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Basic existence sentence. Vocabulary: あそこ, ある are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Simple existence sentence

verification.target_vocab_notes: ラジオ appears with で particle (means)
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: を particle, で particle, past tense 聞いた, よ particle
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Past tense with particles. Vocabulary: ニュース, 聞く are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example showing で particle for means. Natural sentence

verification.target_vocab_notes: ラジオ appears as object with を particle
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, を particle, ます-form
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Simple object-verb sentence. Vocabulary: 私, 毎日, 聞く are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Perfect N5 example. Simple and clear

verification.target_vocab_notes: ラジオ appears with が particle as subject
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: に particle (location), が particle, ます-form
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Basic existence sentence. Vocabulary: 部屋, ある are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Simple existence sentence

verification.target_vocab_notes: 出る appears in masu-form 出ます
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, に particle (destination), ます-form
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Simple direction sentence. Vocabulary: 学校, 行く are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal school
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Clear usage of 出る meaning to leave/depart

verification.target_vocab_notes: 出る appears in past tense 出た
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, を particle, past tense
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Simple past tense. Vocabulary: 彼, 家 are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with past tense. Clear and natural

verification.target_vocab_notes: 出る appears in te-form 出て in compound verb 出ていく
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: を particle, te-form + いく. This compound is acceptable at N5
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Te-form with いく. Vocabulary: 部屋 is N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. て-いく pattern is taught at N5 level

verification.target_vocab_notes: Target is 出る (to appear/go out) but sentence has 死んでる from 死ぬ (to die) + ~ている. This is a false positive - でる here is part of ~ている, not the verb 出る
verification.kana_notes: Kana is accurate for what's present
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ている (死んでる) which is N4 grammar. Also uses って quotation which is casual N4 pattern
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be advanced but wrong vocabulary
verification.overall_notes: FALSE POSITIVE: でる here is part of ~ている conjugation, not the verb 出る. Also contains N4 grammar

verification.target_vocab_notes: Target is 出る but sentence has 並んでる from 並ぶ + ~ている. The でる is part of ~ている conjugation, not the verb 出る. False positive
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ている (並んでる) which is N4 continuous grammar. Also uses んです explanatory pattern
verification.difficulty_notes: Wrong vocabulary, N4 grammar
verification.overall_notes: FALSE POSITIVE: でる is part of ~ている, not the verb 出る. Contains N4 grammar

verification.target_vocab_notes: Target is 出る but sentence has 住んでる from 住む + ~ている. The でる is part of ~ている, not the verb 出る. False positive
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ている (住んでる) which is N4 continuous/state grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Wrong vocabulary, N4 grammar
verification.overall_notes: FALSE POSITIVE: でる is part of ~ている conjugation, not the verb 出る. Contains N4 grammar

verification.target_vocab_notes: 犬 appears with の possessive
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ている (ついてくる) which is N4 continuous grammar. Also complex relative clause construction
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~ている is N4, complex relative clause. Vocabulary: どこでも, 行く are N5. Length: Long. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ~ている grammar. Sentence structure also very complex

verification.target_vocab_notes: 犬 appears as subject with は particle
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, である copula (formal だ). Counter usage is N5
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Copula with counter. Vocabulary: 四本, 足 are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal fact
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Shows basic fact sentence with counter

verification.target_vocab_notes: 犬 appears as predicate noun
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: これは demonstrative, です copula. Simplest N5 structure
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Most basic copula sentence. Vocabulary: これ is basic. Length: Very short. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Perfect beginner N5 example. Extremely simple and clear

verification.target_vocab_notes: 女 appears in 女の人 (woman/female person)
verification.kana_notes: Kana has typo: いっっていきました with triple っ. Should be いっていきました
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ている (入っている) which is N4 continuous grammar. Also uses て-いく compound
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~ている is N4. Vocabulary: 今, 人, 入る are N5. Length: Long. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ~ている grammar. Major kana typo with triple っ

verification.target_vocab_notes: 女 appears in 女の人
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ている (立ってる) which is N4 continuous/state grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~ている is N4. Vocabulary: あそこ, 立つ, 誰 are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ~ている grammar. Too advanced for N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: 女 appears in compound 女らしい (feminine, womanly)
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, i-adjective. ~らしい as suffix for adjective is acceptable at N5
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Basic i-adjective predicate. Vocabulary: 彼女, とても are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. 女らしい is a compound adjective taught at N5 level

verification.target_vocab_notes: 午前 appears in compound 午前中 (during the morning)
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, に particle (location), past tense いた
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Past tense with location. Vocabulary: 彼女, そこ are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal

verification.target_vocab_notes: 午前 appears in 午前中
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, time expression, で particle (location), adverb + verb
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Basic N5 patterns. Vocabulary: 庭, 熱心に, 働く are upper N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Natural sentence with time expression

verification.target_vocab_notes: 午前 appears in 午前中
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ている (読んでいた) which is N4 continuous aspect grammar in past tense
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~ていた is N4 past continuous. Vocabulary: 彼, 本, 読む are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ~ている grammar in past tense. Too advanced for N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: 名前 appears with の possessive and を particle
verification.kana_notes: Missing の after にん (should be ひとの not にんの for 人の)
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, の possessive, を particle, ~やすい (easy to). ~やすい suffix is N5
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~やすい suffix with verb. Vocabulary: 人, 忘れる are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 grammar with ~やすい. Minor kana transcription issue with にん vs ひと

verification.target_vocab_notes: 名前 appears with の possessive and を particle
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ている (知っている) which is N4 continuous/state grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~ている is N4. Vocabulary: 動物, 知る are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ~ている grammar. Too advanced for N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: 名前 appears with の possessive in compound 名前の読み方
verification.kana_notes: Missing の after かれ (should be かれの not かの)
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, の possessive chains, が particle, わからない negative
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Multiple possessive particles. Vocabulary: 彼, 読み方, わかる are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 grammar. Minor kana error with かの vs かれの

verification.target_vocab_notes: 鼻 appears in idiom 鼻にかける (to boast about)
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: を particle, に particle, negative imperative form かけるな. All N5
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Negative command form. Vocabulary: あまり is N5 but idiom 鼻にかける is advanced. Length: Short. Context: Idiomatic expression
verification.overall_notes: 鼻にかける is an idiom meaning 'to boast'. While grammar is N5, idiom may be too advanced for beginners

verification.target_vocab_notes: 鼻 appears in idiom 目と鼻の先 (very close by, literally 'tip of eye and nose')
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: は particle, の possessive, に particle (location), ある existence
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: N5 but uses complex idiom. Vocabulary: 店, 家, 目 are N5 but idiom is advanced. Length: Long. Context: Idiomatic
verification.overall_notes: 目と鼻の先 is an idiom. While vocabulary is N5, the idiomatic meaning may be too advanced for learners

verification.target_vocab_notes: 鼻 appears as subject with が particle
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ている (でている) which is N4 continuous aspect grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~ている is N4. Vocabulary: 出る is N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal (runny nose)
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ~ている grammar. Too advanced for N5

verification.target_vocab_notes: コップ appears twice with の possessive
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: の possessive, question particle か, それとも (or), です copula

verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Shows possessive and それとも conjunction

verification.target_vocab_notes: コップ appears with が particle as subject
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar: の possessive, location に, が particle, ある existence verb
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: Basic existence sentence. Vocabulary: テーブル, 上 are N5. Length: Short. Context: Universal
verification.overall_notes: Perfect N5 example. Simple existence sentence

verification.target_vocab_notes: コップ appears with に particle

verification.grammar_notes: Contains ~ている (入っている) which is N4 continuous/state grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Grammar: ~ている is N4. Vocabulary: この, 水, 入る are N5. Length: Medium. Context: Universal
